Module.Name: scope-test
Module.Description: This module tests the loading of scoped dependencies. This parent module has a dependency, scope-test-dep, which contains a scoped class, Test.Scope.ScopedClass. The parent module also contains a unit test that references Test.Scope.ScopedClass. If the scoped dependency is loaded correctly, then the unit test will be able to find Test.Scope.ScopedClass and pass. If not, then the unit test will fail due to Test.Scope.ScopedClass not being found.
